items.description:
Unleash your style with the Crimson Flow Hoodie! Featuring a bold fusion of crimson red and sleek black, this hoodie is designed for those who stand out. With its fluid, fire-like patterns, it adds a fierce and dynamic touch to any outfit.
Created by ThatOneBrownKid in ALTAVA.
